zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Neville於1430年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Richard Neville29歲，母親Alice Montagu25歲。她於1452年與Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年11月22日在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Neville于1430年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲Richard Neville29岁，母亲Alice Montagu25岁。她于1452年与Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1503年11月22日在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Neville was born in 1430, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Richard Neville, was 29 and her mother, Alice Montagu, was 25. She married Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh in 1452, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 22 November 1503, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Neville est née en 1430, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Neville, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice Montagu, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh en 1452, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1503, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Neville 1430 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Neville 29 und ihre Mutter Alice Montagu 25. Sie hat 1452 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. November 1503 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Neville è nata il nel 1430 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Richard Neville, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Alice Montagu, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh nel 1452, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1503, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Nevilleが1430年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Richard Nevilleは29歳，母Alice Montaguは25歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年11月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Neville(이)가 1430년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Neville(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Montagu(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 11월 22일 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh em 1452, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1503, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Neville родилась в 1430 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Neville было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Montagu, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry FitzHugh , 5th Baron FitzHugh в 1452 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 22 ноября 1503 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
